ddls:
CREATE TABLE "apps" (
  "app_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app */,
  "app_name" TEXT /* Name of the application */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the application */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app */,
  "reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews received for the app */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the app in MB */,
  "installs" TEXT /* Number of installs of the app */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Content rating of the app */,
  "current_version" TEXT /* Current version of the app */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last updated date of the app */,
  "android_version" TEXT /* Minimum Android version required to run the app */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the developer who created the app */,
  "app_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app type (e.g., Free, Paid) */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the app */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the app is currently active */,
  "app_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app's icon */,
  "screenshot_urls" TEXT /* URLs of the app's screenshots */,
  "download_link" TEXT /* Direct download link for the app */,
  "google_play_link" TEXT /* Link to the app on the Google Play Store */,
  "apple_app_store_link" TEXT /* Link to the app on the Apple App Store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_app_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_type_id") REFERENCES app_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_apps_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the category */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the category icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Rating value given by the user */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Review text provided by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the rating */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "installs" (
  "install_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each install event */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being installed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who installed the application */,
  "install_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was installed */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Device model on which the app was installed */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version of the device */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the app was installed */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country from which the app was installed */,
  "city" TEXT /* City from which the app was installed */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referrer (e.g., app store, website) from which the app was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("install_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installs_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_installs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was released */,
  "change_log" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the update */,
  "is_major_update" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is a major release */,
  "changelog_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed changelog */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the update was downloaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_updates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being analyzed */,
  "total_viewers" INTEGER /* Total number of viewers of the app */,
  "avg_session_duration" REAL /* Average session duration in minutes */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Bounce rate percentage */,
  "daily_active_users" INTEGER /* Number of daily active users */,
  "monthly_active_users" INTEGER /* Number of monthly active users */,
  "user_retention_rate" REAL /* User retention rate */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the app */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the app over time */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews received by the app */,
  "crash_rate" REAL /* Crash rate of the app */,
  "app_launch_time" REAL /* Average app launch time */,
  "app_usage_time" REAL /* Average app usage time per session */,
  "session_count" INTEGER /* Number of sessions */,
  "session_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of sessions */,
  "app_version" TEXT /* Version of the app for which the analytics are recorded */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Device model for which the analytics are recorded */,
  "os_version" TEXT /* Operating system version for which the analytics are recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country for which the analytics are recorded */,
  "city" TEXT /* City for which the analytics are recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application receiving feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback given by the user */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates if the feedback has been flagged for review */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the feedback */,
  "feedback_status" TEXT /* Status of the feedback (e.g., new, in progress, resolved) */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was provided */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the feedback record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application requiring the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "is_critical" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is critical for the app's functionality */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the permission */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the permission record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_permissions_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Free, Paid) */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the app type is paid */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the app if it is paid */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the app type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the app type icon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application the report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, user feedback, market analysis) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report has been archived */,
  "file_url" TEXT /* URL of the report file */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_updates" (
  "update_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update history entry */,
  "app_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application being updated */,
  "update_version" TEXT /* Version number of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "is_major_update" INTEGER /* Indicates if the update is a major release */,
  "changelog_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed changelog */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the update was downloaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the update record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_updates_app_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_id") REFERENCES apps ("app_id")
)
